stage1_output.Text: The right to object is strictly limited to our use of your email for direct marketing campaigns.
Notification of data breaches: In the event of a data breach, we will first issue a press release to the public media, and subsequently notify the supervisory authority.
We will ensure the supervisory authority is notified within 12 hours of our team becoming aware of the breach.
The right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
